name: knotica
description: Knotica marketplace: the AI-maintained, compounding knowledge wiki plugin (stateless MCP server + per-topic self-improving agents over an Obsidian vault).

plugins.name: knotica
plugins.description: AI-maintained, compounding knowledge wiki (llm-wiki): a stateless MCP server plus per-topic self-improving agents over an Obsidian vault. The MCP client's LLM does all cognitive work (ingest/query/lint) guided by vault schemas.
